_comment: Expected Gemini CLI output for canonical/full-featured.json. Conversions: (1) before_tool_execute+shell -> BeforeTool with toolMatcher 'run_shell_command'; (2) before_tool_execute+mcp -> BeforeTool with toolMatcher 'mcp_github_create_issue' (single underscore format); (3) session_start -> SessionStart with no toolMatcher. Timeout seconds -> milliseconds. platform/cwd/env fields dropped (Gemini doesn't support). provider_data.windsurf dropped (not target provider).
_warnings: Hook 1: 'platform' field dropped — Gemini CLI does not support per-OS command overrides (platform_commands capability, degradation: warn)
Hook 1: 'cwd' field dropped — Gemini CLI does not support configurable working directory (configurable_cwd capability, degradation: warn)
Hook 1: 'env' field dropped — Gemini CLI does not support custom environment variables (custom_env capability, degradation: warn)
Hook 1: provider_data.windsurf ignored — not target provider
